testcase.name: test_prematch_prediction_structure

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing factor: squad_strength assert 'squad_strength' in {'death_overs': {'logit_contribution': 0.0, 'team1_avg_conceded': 48, 'team1_avg_score': 45, 'team1_net': -3, ...}, 'form': {'damping': 0.4, 'logit_contribution': -0.096, 'player_form_logit': 0.0, 'team1_last5_losses': 2, ...}, 'h2h': {'logit_contribution': -0.0514, 'no_result': 0, 'ratio': 0.286, 'team1_wins': 2, ...}, 'home_advantage': {'logit_contribution': 0.018, 'weight': 0.06}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration29_dual_prediction.py:68: in test_prematch_prediction_structure assert factor in factors, f"Missing factor: {factor}" E AssertionError: Missing factor: squad_strength E assert 'squad_strength' in {'death_overs': {'logit_contribution': 0.0, 'team1_avg_conceded': 48, 'team1_avg_score': 45, 'team1_net': -3, ...}, 'form': {'damping': 0.4, 'logit_contribution': -0.096, 'player_form_logit': 0.0, 'team1_last5_losses': 2, ...}, 'h2h': {'logit_contribution': -0.0514, 'no_result': 0, 'ratio': 0.286, 'team1_wins': 2, ...}, 'home_advantage': {'logit_contribution': 0.018, 'weight': 0.06}, ...}

testcase.name: test_prematch_factor_weights

failure.message: AssertionError: Factor form: expected weight 0.35, got 0.12 assert 0.12 == 0.35

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration29_dual_prediction.py:94: in test_prematch_factor_weights assert actual_weight == expected_weight, f"Factor {factor_name}: expected weight {expected_weight}, got {actual_weight}" E AssertionError: Factor form: expected weight 0.35, got 0.12 E assert 0.12 == 0.35
